label: Transparent labradorite flash motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Labradorite transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a labradorite flash mineral motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A polished labradorite stone with blue-green iridescent flash, grey feldspar base, gold glints, wet rock-shore shadows, natural fractures, and crisp mineral edges. Geological accuracy, mysterious creative identity, not opal or amethyst.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show full stone and flash planes without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no opal rainbow, no aurora sky, no jewelry setting, no hand, no beach landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose gemstones, no purple crystal cluster.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Labradorite light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Labradorite", derived from a labradorite flash cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible creative UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Labradorite, Labradorite Flash, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from blue-green labradorite flash, feldspar grey body, gold glints, wet stone shadows, and rock-shore mineral fractures. The board must read as labradorite, not opal, amethyst, or generic blue-green gradient.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: mysterious creative system, 8px radius, mist feldspar surfaces, blue-flash primary actions, green-fire focus states, gold glint accent chips, wet-stone borders, graphite text, diagonal flash-line dividers, subtle feldspar grain texture.
Constraints: no opal rainbow UI, no aurora wallpaper, no generic teal gradient, no purple amethyst cues, no unrelated neon colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Labradorite", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Labradorite dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Labradorite". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from the labradorite flash cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Labradorite, Labradorite Flash, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve blue flash active states, green fire secondary controls, gold glint accents, graphite and wet-stone dark surfaces, feldspar texture, diagonal flash dividers, creative dashboard rhythm, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as labradorite, not opal or generic teal.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: shore-graphite dark backgrounds, wet-stone cards, pale feldspar foreground, blue-flash buttons, green-fire focus rings, gold chart glints, subtle iridescent line texture, crisp controls.
Constraints: no opal rainbow, no aurora scene, no neon cyber teal, no pure-black flat background, no purple crystal cues, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Labradorite".
